adr_integrity.details: Critical ADR violation: authentication flow deviates from ADR-0003

dmails.description: ADR-0003 authentication flow violation forces high severity
dmails.detail: The JWT validation logic bypasses the refresh token rotation specified in ADR-0003. This triggers ADRForceHigh override (score 65 >= threshold 60).

reasoning: ADR integrity score 65 exceeds force-high threshold of 60, escalating severity regardless of total divergence value.
